prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: In a T4 work setting, the evaluated element is A-101 Timing & mechanical within 2.9 Automotive & Powertrain. The relevant subcategory is 2.9.1 Engine & Drivetrain. The observed field condition is: compression/leak-down interpretation (low two adjacent cylinders = head gasket - classic FD from gauge numbers). The work is being assessed at the in-service lifecycle state with source anchors OEM service info.
title: T4 A-101 Fault diagnosis
